name: Cloudflare Project Alexandria
description: Project Alexandria provides recurring annual credits for open-source projects, including Zero Trust access, R2 storage, Workers, Pages, and plan upgrades.

perks.title: Enhanced Zero Trust Access
perks.description: Includes Remote Browser Isolation for project infrastructure.

perks.title: Increased R2 Storage
perks.description: Additional R2 object storage for builds and artifacts.

perks.title: Workers & Pages Credits
perks.description: Increased request limits for Cloudflare Workers and Pages.

perks.title: Plan Upgrades
perks.description: Upgrade to Cloudflare Pro, Business, or Enterprise plan.

eligibility: Must operate solely on a non-profit basis.
Must align with the project's mission.
Must maintain an open-source project with a recognized OSS license.
applicationProcess: Submit a sponsorship request through the Project Alexandria page.
Acceptance is at Cloudflare's sole discretion.
